summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the opening around a spatial anchor so it does not mirror the adjacent chapter's temporal-lead opening, and adjusted the closing beat to hand off directly into the next chapter's day-long observation of the stolen ward names spreading across the city.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin with Gideon's room above Patent Row instead of a temporal lead-in, while preserving the same setting and tone.
Moved the explicit next-day marker to Silas's entrance line so chronology with the prior chapter remains clear.
Revised the final sentence so Silas follows the bill-stickers toward the river, creating a cleaner bridge into the next chapter's opening situation.
